summary: Wire distill and context7 skills into the active system: enable both (plus budget-aware-router) in compound-engineering.json enabled list; add distill to oh-my-opencode.json MCP toggles; add @tarquinen/opencode-dcp@latest plugin to opencode.json plugin array (was documented in README and plugins/opencode-dcp/info.md but missing from active config).

changes.compound-engineering.json: Added 'budget-aware-router', 'context7', 'distill' to skills.enabled array (15 → 18 enabled skills)
changes.oh-my-opencode.json: Added distill MCP toggle { enabled: true } to mcp section (2 → 3 MCP toggles)
changes.opencode.json: Added '@tarquinen/opencode-dcp@latest' to plugin array (7 → 8 plugins); DCP was referenced in README and plugins/opencode-dcp/info.md but absent from active plugin config

validation.notes: All changes are config additions only. New skills are additive (no conflicts). DCP plugin was already documented as installed. No breaking changes.
